name: Round Steak with Rich Gravy
recipeIngredient: 1 can condensed cream of mushroom soup (10 1/2 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into 5 or 6 serving-size pieces.
2. Place the steak pieces in the crockpot.
3. Add the dry onion soup mix, water, and canned cream of mushroom soup to the pot.
4. Cover and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours.
5. Serve with mashed potatoes.
